chromium_base.build_output_check_contract: python3 scripts/chromium_source.py check reports build_outputs for BrowseForgeDev GN args/build.ninja, BrowseForgeLinuxDocker args.gn/build.ninja/chrome, and required Linux runtime sidecars/locales so missing baseline generation and incomplete packageable release outputs are machine-readable.

profile_isolated_workdir_contract.docker_helper_default: scripts/chromium_docker.py uses BROWSEFORGE_CHROMIUM_LINUX_WORKDIR before the BROWSEFORGE_CHROMIUM_WORKDIR shared checkout fallback so Linux Docker deps no longer have to clobber a host-profile checkout.
profile_isolated_workdir_contract.native_helper_default: scripts/chromium_native.py uses BROWSEFORGE_CHROMIUM_HOST_WORKDIR before the BROWSEFORGE_CHROMIUM_WORKDIR shared checkout fallback so native artifact preflight/builds inspect the host-profile checkout.
profile_isolated_workdir_contract.source_helper_default: scripts/chromium_source.py uses BROWSEFORGE_CHROMIUM_HOST_WORKDIR before the BROWSEFORGE_CHROMIUM_WORKDIR shared checkout fallback so macOS/Windows host deps can keep a dedicated profile checkout.

dependency_profile_status.profile_switching_note: The shared external checkout cannot be treated as simultaneously mac and linux dependency-profile ready; use BROWSEFORGE_CHROMIUM_HOST_WORKDIR for host/native deps and BROWSEFORGE_CHROMIUM_LINUX_WORKDIR for Docker linux deps when maintaining parallel baselines.
dependency_profile_status.source_sync_command_uses_host_deps: python3 scripts/chromium_source.py acquire --execute --step sync-deps now expands to gclient sync --with_branch_heads --with_tags --deps=mac on Darwin

chromium_base.feature_parity_patch_detail: ContactsManager, ContactsManagerExtraProperties, ContentIndex, NetInfoDownlinkMax, SerialPortConnected, and WebShare are patched to desktop-stable runtime feature defaults so permissions/feature inventory probes align with a modern desktop Chrome persona without requesting device access or invoking share UI.

last_dev_baseline_probe.command: python3 scripts/chromium_source.py acquire --execute --step sync-deps && python3 scripts/chromium_source.py acquire --execute --step run-hooks && python3 scripts/chromium_source.py acquire --execute --step generate-dev-build
last_dev_baseline_probe.error_summary: GN started after mac platform GN was installed and wrote out/BrowseForgeDev/args.gn, then failed in build/config/apple/sdk_info.py because xcodebuild requires full Xcode while xcode-select points at CommandLineTools.
last_dev_baseline_probe.next_action: Select full Xcode, then rerun python3 scripts/chromium_source.py acquire --execute --step generate-dev-build until out/BrowseForgeDev/build.ninja exists.

linux_docker_rebuild_resume.rosetta_error: rosetta error: unexpectedly got a signal during sigreturn

last_macos_preflight.blocking_error: xcodebuild requires full Xcode; active developer directory is /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools
last_macos_preflight.machine_readable_status: python3 scripts/chromium_native.py check --platform macos-arm64 reports native_toolchain_ready=false, xcodebuild_ok=false, and build_ninja_exists=false
last_macos_preflight.next_action: Install/select full Xcode, then rerun python3 scripts/chromium_native.py gn-gen --platform macos-arm64 --execute

last_windows_preflight.machine_readable_status: python3 scripts/chromium_native.py check --platform windows-x64 reports host_supported=false, native_toolchain_ready=false, output_binary_exists=false, portable_layout_exists=false
last_windows_preflight.next_action: Run python3 scripts/chromium_native.py gn-gen --platform windows-x64 --execute on a Windows host with the pinned checkout and toolchain, then build-chrome and package after build_ninja/output exist

macos-arm64.gn_args: target_os="mac" target_cpu="arm64" is_debug=false symbol_level=1 is_component_build=false use_remoteexec=false

windows-x64.gn_args: target_os="win" target_cpu="x64" is_debug=false symbol_level=1 is_component_build=false use_remoteexec=false

verification: python3 scripts/chromium_source.py acquire --execute --step sync-deps  # Darwin expands to --deps=mac

chromium_base.platform_gn_check_contract: python3 scripts/chromium_source.py check reports tools.platform_gn_binary and tools.platform_gn_exists so host GN wrapper failures are machine-readable before BrowseForgeDev generation.
chromium_base.reproducibility_note: The selected ref and commit are recorded, checked out locally, gclient sync/hooks completed, macOS host DEPS are present in the shared checkout, BrowseForgeDev args.gn now exists, and GN generation is blocked before build.ninja by full Xcode selection because xcode-select points at CommandLineTools. Linux Docker args.gn/build.ninja/chrome and required runtime sidecars remain present from the packaged linux-x64 artifact, but the shared checkout dependency profile should not be treated as simultaneously linux and mac ready; use BROWSEFORGE_CHROMIUM_HOST_WORKDIR and BROWSEFORGE_CHROMIUM_LINUX_WORKDIR for parallel baselines. Source-level patches remain applied in the external checkout.

decision: Proceed with release-grade validation of the source-level BrowseForge Chromium runtime; live SannySoft Linux headless smoke passes configured UA, webdriver, locale/timezone, hardware, and WebGL values, but BrowserLeaks/Pixelscan/iphey/BrowserScan/CreepJS/SannySoft headed matrix remains required.

local_dogfood_binary.reason: Existing local Chrome can exercise BrowseForge Chromium-family launch wiring, but it is not the selected Chromium base, not patched, and not a BrowseForge runtime release artifact.

reproducibility_note: The selected ref and commit are recorded, checked out locally, gclient sync/hooks completed, macOS host DEPS are present in the shared checkout, BrowseForgeDev args.gn now exists, and GN generation is blocked before build.ninja by full Xcode selection because xcode-select points at CommandLineTools. Linux Docker args.gn/build.ninja/chrome and required runtime sidecars remain present from the packaged linux-x64 artifact, but the shared checkout dependency profile should not be treated as simultaneously linux and mac ready; use BROWSEFORGE_CHROMIUM_HOST_WORKDIR and BROWSEFORGE_CHROMIUM_LINUX_WORKDIR for parallel baselines. Source-level patches remain applied in the external checkout.

automation.check_contract: python3 scripts/chromium_source.py check reports tool paths, checkout presence, chromium_src_head, chromium_src_matches_manifest, and aggregate native patch/scaffold --check status against the manifest base_commit. It also reports build_outputs for BrowseForgeDev and BrowseForgeLinuxDocker artifacts. Host platform GN availability is reported through tools.platform_gn_binary and tools.platform_gn_exists.

missing_prerequisites: full Xcode selected by xcode-select for macOS host GN generation
full Xcode selected by xcode-select for BrowseForgeDev macOS GN generation
